name: Duck in Avocado
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped pecans or toasted sliced almonds
2 tbsp Frozen undiluted orange juice, defrosted
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the avocados, cut them in half, and immediately dip each half into the water mixed with lemon juice to prevent discoloration.
2. Ensure the duck meat is skinless and boneless. Cut it into bite-sized pieces.
3. Mix the duck meat with orange segments. Divide the mixture into six portions. Fill avocado halves, placed on a platter lined with lettuce leaves, with the meat and orange portions.
4. Mix concentrated orange juice with mayonnaise and spoon over each stuffed avocado. Top each with nuts and garnish with parsley sprigs and orange wedges.
Chef's Secret: Always peel avocados first, then cut them in half to avoid mashing if ripe. Refrigerate wrapped in plastic wrap for up to a day without discoloring. For an oriental twist, mix 1 tbsp soy sauce into the mayonnaise, use canned tangerine segments (rinse and drain), and garnish with sesame seeds. Chill overnight before serving. Makes 6 servings.
